case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A. VS. LOUIS L GAMACHE ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 70544029) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 70544029) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT GAMACHE, LOUIS L DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-29-2024
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-19-2024 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-18-2024 CONTINUED TO AUG-20-2024 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
